response.justification: Strong, broad full-stack and systems engineer with 15+ years across web, embedded, low-latency micro-services (millions of req/s at Sociomantic), and a CS degree. However, the resume shows no direct experience with the core of this role: growth/experimentation systems, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis. Seniority is presented as Senior/Staff IC rather than Principal/IC6, and there's little evidence of the cross-team, multi-workstream platform leadership the role demands. A reasonable candidate for an adjacent platform role, but a stretch against the experimentation-specific bar.
strengths: Deep distributed/low-latency systems experience (micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Broad polyglot range incl. required languages (Java, C#, C/C++, JavaScript/TypeScript) plus strong TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship
CS degree and 15+ years shipping production systems across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation/A-B testing, feature flagging, or measurement-platform experience
Weak signal on data aptitude, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, and statistical analysis
Limited evidence of Principal-level (IC6) cross-team architecture leadership across multiple workstreams
